flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Park University rose 43% between 2021 and 2024 ($12.3k → $17.5k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Park University fell 36% between 2021 and 2024 (7.1k → 4.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 34% at Park University vs the 2018–2022 baseline (5.2k vs 7.9k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Park University rose 24% between 2006 and 2009 ($6.8k → $8.4k).
